Description: The personalities you'll meet almost everywhere; foundation of every running community.
Archetypes in this Tier: The Health Runner; Mood Booster Runner; The Solo Runner; Weight Loss Runner

Description: Less common, but you'll definitely know someone like this.
Archetypes in this Tier: The Club Runner; The Early Bird; The Start'n'Stop Runner; The Reluctant Runner

Description: More dedicated or niche runner lifestyles.
Archetypes in this Tier: The Anywhere Runner; The Trendy Runner; The Medal Hunter

Description: Highly committed runners with strong habits and ambitious goals; not necessarily the fastest, just obsessed.
Archetypes in this Tier: The Long Runner; The Ambitious Late Bloomer

Description: Extremely uncommon secret/bonus archetypes; people in every community know one.
Archetypes in this Tier: Strava CEO; Pace Demon; Playlist Merchant; Coffee Run Enjoyer; Gear Acquisition Syndrome; Silent Assassin; PB Hunter; Reward Runner

Tier: Reluctant Runner's tier and all 8 Legendary bonus archetypes' tiers were not defined in doc2/doc3 and were assigned by Claude so every archetype has a valid, reachable place in the scoring system.
